headline: KL Flash Floods Cause RM2.8 Billion Damage in 2025
context: Kuala Lumpur experienced 34 flash flood events in 2025 causing RM2.8 billion in cumulative damage.

cards.big: 34 flash floods caused RM2.8 billion damage in KL in 2025
cards.sub: Frequency increased 45% from 2022 as drainage infrastructure fails to cope

cards.big: SMART Tunnel activated 8 times but handles only 15% of KL stormwater
cards.sub: RM4 billion tunnel built in 2007 designed for 50-year events not annual ones

cards.big: 72% of hotspots are where drainage capacity is below 2010 design standards
cards.sub: Urban development since 2010 increased impervious surface 28% without upgrades

cards.big: Insurance claims for flood damage in KL reached RM1.2 billion in 2025
cards.sub: 12 insurers raised flood premiums 40-60% or excluded flood-prone postcodes

cards.big: Recurring floods test whether urban development can proceed without drainage accountability
RM2.8 billion flood damage in KL — drainage infrastructure built for 1990s rainfall cannot handle 2025 storms.
